description: Create a professional business letter in Microsoft Word 2010 using 12pt Times New Roman font. The letter should include the sender address 'Sarah Mitchell, 450 Commerce Drive, Suite 200, Arlington, VA 22201', the date 'November 20, 2024', and the recipient address 'Ms. Rebecca Johnson, Director of Operations, Pinnacle Solutions Inc., 1200 Market Street, Philadelphia, PA 19107'. Use the salutation 'Dear Ms. Johnson:', a 3-4 sentence body paragraph regarding a project status update about delivering a quarterly report ahead of schedule, the closing 'Sincerely,', and the signature block 'Sarah Mitchell, Senior Project Manager'. Save the document as business_letter.docx to the Desktop\WordTasks folder.
